channel.title: junko's ramblings
channel.description: i post pretty awful stuff here, please excuse my language.

item.title: post #1766361600
item.description: i tried to migrate the website to [[astro]](https://astro.build/), feels nice to use but i feel like i prefer the scuffed-website-generator that i had. maybe later in the future.

item.title: post #1766361500
item.description: https://youtu.be/hbuNxmAXdNk absolute banger, check it out!!
